title: UniversalTransactionResponse
description: Response object returned by pushChainClient.universal.sendTransaction(). Contains transaction hash and methods to await confirmation.

wait.description: Method to await transaction confirmation. Returns a TransactionReceipt. Type: () => Promise<TransactionReceipt>

notes: The exact shape of TxResponse is not fully documented. The hash field and wait() method are inferred from standard EVM transaction response patterns and SDK usage examples.
